title: Sushi Sundays at Tokyo Bay
description:
Every Sunday from 6pm, /place/Tokyo Bay serves the freshest sushi on the island.

Don't miss their signature dragon roll and bottomless sake specials.

Read more on our blog

title: Anguilla Summer Festival 2026
subheadline: The biggest beach party of the year
description:
Join us August 1-7 for the annual Anguilla Summer Festival.

Boat racing, live music, food stalls, and the famous J'ouvert morning.

Featured at /place/Meads Bay and /place/Shoal Bay East.

SPROCKA @ VEYA RESTAURANT+Veya Restaurant+tuesday kicks things off!

title: Up For Some Snorkeling?!
subheadline: These are some of the best ways to spend a lazy Sunday
description:
Chilling at /place/Sandy Ground Beach is usually fun but here are some of our top /place/Anguilla Arch For an adventure or /place/Little Bay for an enchanting afternoon snorkeling between the peaceful yet dramatic cliff-side reefs.

Includes snorkeling at Little Bay, champagne toast, and fresh tapas.

TASTY'S POV | CLAYTON CARTY & ACOUSTICS+Tasty's+tuesday this Tuesday!
